title: Wang Lin/Techniques
content:

Techniques

Techniques

Abilities
[
]

Blue Flames
 : Cold attribute flame from 
Underworld Ascension Method
. - Chapter 121

Red Lightning
 : Wang Lin's Ji Realm Divine Sense. - Ch.127

Soul Piercing Eyes
(Divine Sense Eyes) : These were the divine sense eyes that were only obtained once someone had reached a certain level of mastery in restrictions - Chapter 179

Heart of Slaughter - Chapter 574

Heart Restriction - Chapter 858

Eyes Suppressing the World (From the fragment of the sword the green-robed old man (Ji Si) had fused into his eyes) - Chapter 1896

Soul Nature
[
]

Wang Lin's Soul contains the 
Soul-Devourer
 nature, Soul Gem. - Chapter 119

Soul Gem : Soul devourer with a soul gem could create wandering souls.  - Chapter 193

He later obtained the form of an Ancient Thunder Dragon (Ancient Thunder Dragon was 
Greed
's Second Origin Soul but in the end, it was eaten by the soul-devourer form of Wang Lin) - Chapter 650

Heavenly Flame (absorb a bit of the Burn the Heavens spell) - Chapter 1021

Devilish Flames
, 
Fire Dragon, and Flame Dragon (these three kinds of fire energy fused with the Vermilion Bird). - Chapter 1068

Wang Lin obtain a drop of Soul Blood from the Ancient Race Heavenly Blood Calamity to transform his soul into an Ancient Order Soul close to the Ancient Ancestor, close enough to be considered the the Ancient Ancestor's Fourth Child (the Three Children obtain 3 Soul Drop each and are the Founders of the 3 Ancient Country).

[

Human/Celestial

dao/qi
. (Fused back with the Main Body when he obtained a strand of hair of the

) - Chapter 211

True Bodies

Bloodlines
[
]

Ancient Bloodline (
Ancient Clan
)

C
ommon Royal (Former)
: Royal Blood in the Cave World mean that your bloodline purity is close to the Ancestor that left the Ancient Order Lineage in the 
Cave World
. The Ancestor/
Ye Mo
's bloodline belongs to the High class so Wang Lin has a not so low bloodline but it's not the best because Ye Mo's original bloodline as an Ancient Clansman was common in the Ancient Clan's Imperial Family but with the 9 drop of blood and one drop of soul blood, he was able to obtain a bloodline higher than the Royal Bloodline.

Ancestor
: After completing the 
 Three Destructions and Seven Tribulations
 of all three branches of the Ancient Clan, Wang Lin received two more drops of soul blood from the Ancient Ancestor's statue. In addition to the drop he received back in the Cave World, this transformed his bloodline to the level of the 
Ancient Ancestor
's son and was stated by members of the Ancient Clan to allow him to create his own Ancient Clan.

Celestial Bloodline (
Celestial Clan
)

Royal
: Wang Lin was first given the Celestial Bloodline by Lian Daofei in the world of the Nether Beast. Later, Wang Lin obtains a Celestial Vein formed by the hair of the 
Celestial Ancestor
 allowing him to fuse celestial energy and ancient energy to a certain degree.

Ancestor
: Wang Lin later obtains the head of the Celestial Ancestor, which he refines into his Grand Empyrean Sun and is implied to have increased the quality of his bloodline as well.
